scene_summary: A spare paper-slab plate: a descending green stepped trace cuts across stained archive surface, crossed by heavy black cable arcs, with a dark red-orange dotted band, yellow tape tabs, seams, pinholes, scuffs, and small terminal nodes serving as interaction anchors.
usable_surfaces: descending green circuit path with raised circular nodes
dark recessed red-orange dotted network band
yellow adhesive tape tabs under cable pressure
thin vertical archive seams and paper layer joints
small pinholes, glints, stains, and graphite scuffs
translucent cloudy inlay over the band edge

detected_objects.label: hero dark dotted network band
detected_objects.visual_evidence: long recessed charcoal-black horizontal band filled with dense red-orange pin lights and dot-matrix breaks along the lower-left half

detected_objects.label: left yellow cable tab
detected_objects.visual_evidence: raised ochre-yellow rectangular tape tab tilted under the sweeping black cable on the left side

detected_objects.label: translucent archive grain insert
detected_objects.visual_evidence: pale cloudy translucent grain patch laid over the right end of the dark dotted band, visibly softer and milkier than surrounding paper

detected_objects.label: lower graphite edge notch
detected_objects.visual_evidence: dark graphite-like smudged damage and rubbed shadow along the lower paper field beneath the cable, forming a scuffed lower edge notch

detected_objects.label: Distributed Marker
detected_objects.visual_evidence: loose constellation of small black puncture dots and stains below the dark band, distinct from the red dot matrix and scattered as a clustered marker field

detected_objects.label: thin archive seam
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: warm registry resin window
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: right-side green terminal dot
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: Distributed Marker
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate stays sparse: one stepped green gesture, two cable arcs, one dark dotted band, and quiet paper seams. Marks are legible with broad negative space, not cluttered.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
